scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm --filter @crewden/hub-core build && wrangler deploy --keep-vars --var CREWDEN_VERSION:${CREWDEN_VERSION:-1.5.1} --var CREWDEN_COMMIT_SHA:${CREWDEN_COMMIT_SHA:-} --var CREWDEN_BUILD_ID:${CREWDEN_BUILD_ID:-}
scripts.deploy:test: pnpm --filter @crewden/hub-core build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.test.jsonc --keep-vars --var CREWDEN_ENV:test --var CREWDEN_VERSION:${CREWDEN_VERSION:-1.5.1-test} --var CREWDEN_COMMIT_SHA:${CREWDEN_COMMIT_SHA:-} --var CREWDEN_BUILD_ID:${CREWDEN_BUILD_ID:-}
